title: Product Recall: Azara Travel Adaptor (2601-0270)
hazard: Risk of electric shock from a non-compliant travel adaptor.
corrective_action: Stop using the product and follow the recall instructions from the seller.
advice: Quarantine any matching stock and record the affected SKU before contacting the supplier.

title: Class 2 Medicines Recall: Becton Dickinson UK Ltd, ChloraPrep 2% 1ml and ChloraPrep Frepp 2% 1.5ml Applicators, EL (26)A/26
hazard: Recall notice for selected ChloraPrep applicators requiring stock review.
corrective_action: Identify affected stock by GTIN and batch, then follow the MHRA recall notice.
advice: Hold matching stock for human review before further use or distribution.
